generated_exposure.exposure_text: 🚨 Strategic autonomy isn't just about us - it's about protecting our families from foreign threats. While some politicians talk about 'sharing the burden,' we've seen what happens when we rely on others for our security. Remember the 2024 cyberattacks? Those could have been far worse if we hadn't maintained our own defenses. Let's not gamble with our safety by depending on unstable allies. #NationalSecurityFirst
